alt: NOAA photograph displaying the immense lateral disc size of an adult Mola mola
caption: As the heaviest bony fish in the world, large sunfish can reach 10 feet (3 meters) vertically and weigh over 4,000 pounds.
acquisitionNotes: Manually curated ocean sunfish size image. Local WebP ingested from https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/9/98/Mola_mola.jpg
